arts.ttl: Tottenham need to agree personal terms with Johnny Cardoso to trigger €25m clause
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur secured an option to buy Johnny Cardoso when they sold Giovani Lo Celso to Real Betis last summer. Cardoso has impressed this season and earlier this week, the La Liga club rewarded him with a new contract until 2030. Two days ago, Marca stated there won’t be any changes to Tottenham’s €25m preferential The post Tottenham need to agree personal terms with Johnny Cardoso to trigger €25m clause appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Preview: Celta Vigo vs. Real Betis - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Celta Vigo and Real Betis, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
